batch_summary: Three Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure Inc. instruments analyzed (ISSUE-43 item 8 — all three PULLED). Deed [335] is a Memorandum of Option (Nov 7, 2016) granting Texas Central an exclusive option to purchase 2.172 ac from Trust No. 2's 265.884-ac Richie League parent tract (FC Doc# 01603931, OR/1705/513). Deed [336] is the First Amendment to Memorandum of Option (Feb 28, 2020) reducing the option acreage to 1.354 ac via a revised metes-and-bounds (FC Doc# 2000672). Deed [337] is the Warranty Deed (Feb 28, 2020) exercising the option — Trust No. 2 conveyed 1.354 ac of Wm. Ritchie Survey A-527, Freestone County, to Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure Inc., a Texas corporation, for $10.00 + OGVC (FC Doc# 2000667). The conveyance is subject to existing mineral reservations in the chain (preserving Gude's 50% non-executive mineral interest per deed [20]/[39]) and existing leases and easements. M. Stephen Beard signed as Sole Trustee of Trust No. 2 on all three instruments, confirming his continued activity through February 2020. SCRIVENER'S ERROR: deed [337] Exhibit A legal description states 'MADISON COUNTY, TEXAS' — should be FREESTONE COUNTY; new ISSUE-49 created. The Texas Central high-speed rail project (Dallas–Houston) was the purpose of this acquisition. Title company: Community National Title LLC (Dallas).

operations.description: Add Trust History entries for Texas Central Railroad option (2016) and conveyance (2020) — Trust No. 2 activity
operations.anchor: | After 2005 | M. Stephen Beard replaced by Donald Fredrick Willis Jr. as Trust No. 1 trustee.
operations.content:
| 11/7/2016 | **Deed [335]**: Memorandum of Option — Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) grants Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. an exclusive option to purchase 2.172 ac (later amended to 1.354 ac) from the 265.884-ac Richie League parent tract (Wm. Richie Survey A-527, Freestone County) for the Dallas–Houston high-speed rail project. Tract No. TX-FR-100.000. Option period: through Dec 31, 2019. Parent deed: Distribution Deed 7/7/2005, Vol. 1327 Pg. 561 = deed [16]/[37]. Acknowledged McLennan County before LaJan Coleman NP (ID#322227-5, exp. 10/4/2018); grantee acknowledged Harris County before Joel L. Haley NP (exp. 3/7/2020). FC Doc# 01603931, OR/1705/513–517, filed Dec 2, 2016 11:53 AM, Linda Jarvis County Clerk, $42.00, Receipt 139113. |
| 2/28/2020 | **Deeds [336]/[337]**: First Amendment to Memorandum of Option + Warranty Deed — Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) conveys 1.354 ac of Wm. Ritchie A-527 to Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. Option acreage reduced from 2.172 to 1.354 ac via amended metes-and-bounds (Schedule 3). Warranty deed conveys fee interest subject to existing mineral reservations (preserving Gude's 50% non-executive mineral interest per [20]/[39]), existing leases, and recorded easements. Consideration: $10.00 + OGVC. Title company: Community National Title LLC (Dallas). ⚠️ **SCRIVENER'S ERROR**: Deed [337] Exhibit A states "MADISON COUNTY, TEXAS" — should be FREESTONE COUNTY (see ISSUE-49). Acknowledged McLennan County before Grace LaJan Coleman NP (ID#3222275, exp. 10/4/2022); grantee acknowledged Dallas County before Harriett Haran NP (exp. 12/9/2023). [337]: FC Doc# 2000667, filed Mar 4, 2020 12:06 PM, Linda Jarvis County Clerk, 7 pages, $46.00. [336]: FC Doc# 2000672, filed Mar 5, 2020 8:37 AM, Linda Jarvis County Clerk, 6 pages, $42.00. **Confirms Beard sole trustee of Trust No. 2 as of February 2020.** |

Parent tract: 265.884 ac Wm. Richie A-527 (= deed [16]/[37] Richie League minus prior carve-outs). Option history: [335] Memorandum of Option (11/7/2016, FC Doc# 01603931, OR/1705/513) originally optioned 2.172 ac; [336] First Amendment (2/28/2020, FC Doc# 2000672) reduced to 1.354 ac via revised metes-and-bounds (Schedule 3). Warranty deed [337] conveys fee interest SUBJECT TO existing mineral reservations in chain (preserving Gude's 50% non-executive mineral interest per [20]/[39]), existing oil/gas leases, and visible/recorded easements. Consideration: $10.00 + OGVC. M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee, signed all three instruments. Trust No. 2 net Richie League holding reduced by 1.354 ac. Metes-and-bounds: beginning at east corner of Trust No. 2 tract at FM 246 NE ROW line, near Texas Utilities Electric Company tract (Vol. 1004, Pg. 286 = deed [13]); generally NW along proposed rail alignment curve (R=288,765.25 ft), then SE along TU Electric boundary to POB. ISSUE-43 item 8 satisfied.

03_DEED_CHAIN_SUMMARY.md.timestamp_summary: Deeds [335], [336], [337] added to Phase 5 — Texas Central Railroad option (2016), amendment (2020), and warranty deed (2020); 1.354 ac Richie League conveyed from Trust No. 2; ISSUE-43 item 8 PULLED

operations.description: Add deed entries [335], [336], [337] to Phase 5, after [334]
operations.content:
8. `2016-11-07_[335]_f` — Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) → Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. (memorandum of option, Freestone) — **Memorandum of Option** for exclusive option to purchase 2.172 acres (later amended to 1.354 ac) from 265.884-ac parent tract in Wm. Richie Survey A-527, Freestone County. Tract No. TX-FR-100.000. Parent deed: Distribution Deed dated July 7, 2005, Vol. 1327, Pg. 561 = deed [16]/[37]. Option period: through December 31, 2019. Dallas–Houston high-speed rail project. The underlying Option Agreement is unrecorded; this memorandum provides constructive notice only. Map exhibit shows County Road 940, ROW length 572.98 ft, 1.56 ac ROW + 0.613 ac additional acreage = 2.172 ac total option area. Grantor address: 5408 Point Wood Circle, Waco TX 76710. Grantee address: 1409 South Lamar, Suite 1022, Dallas TX 75215. Grantee VP: Mark M. Waller (signed). Grantor acknowledged Nov 7, 2016, McLennan County, before LaJan Coleman NP (ID#322227-5, exp. 10/4/2018). Grantee acknowledged Nov 22, 2016, Harris County, before Joel L. Haley NP (ID#126439219, exp. 3/7/2020). Return to: Contract Land Staff, LLC, PO Box 8767, Ennis TX 75120. FC Doc# 01603931, OR Vol. 1705, Pg. 513–517 (5 pages), filed Dec 2, 2016 11:53 AM, Linda Jarvis County Clerk, $42.00, Receipt 139113. **No conveyance** — option memorandum only; no mineral impact. ISSUE-43 item 8. Phase 5

9. `2020-02-28_[336]_f` — Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) + Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. (first amendment to memorandum of option, Freestone) — **First Amendment to Memorandum of Option.** Amends deed [335] (FC Doc# 01603931). Effective February 28, 2020. Replaces original Exhibit A (265.884-ac parent tract, 2.172-ac option area) with Schedule 3 — new metes-and-bounds description for **1.354 acres** in Wm. Ritchie Survey A-527. Reduction from 2.172 to 1.354 ac (0.818 ac decrease). Parent deed unchanged: Vol. 1327, Pg. 561 (deed [16]/[37]). ⚠️ **Name variant**: [335] spells survey "William Richie" (no 't'); [336] Schedule 3 spells "WILLIAM RITCHIE" (with 't') — both refer to same A-527. Metes-and-bounds: beginning at east corner of Trust No. 2 tract at FM 246 NE ROW line (80-foot ROW), at south corner of Texas Utilities Electric Company tract (Vol. 1004, Pg. 286 = deed [13]); SW along FM 246, 8.46 ft + 212.69 ft; NW on curve (R=288,765.25 ft, delta 00°06'54", chord N33°32'43"W 580.16 ft) across Trust No. 2 tract to NE line at TU Electric SW line; SE 533.02 ft to POB; containing 1.354 ac / 58,970 sq ft. Grantee VP: Jordan Riness (signed). Grantor acknowledged Feb 28, 2020, McLennan County, before Grace LaJan Coleman NP (ID#3222275, exp. 10/4/2022; same notary as [335] with renewed commission). Grantee acknowledged Mar 2, 2020, Dallas County, before Harriett Haran NP (ID#132278159, exp. 12/9/2023). Return to: Texas Central Partners, LLC, Attn: Contract Land Staff, LLC, 1409 South Lamar Street, Suite 1022, Dallas TX 75215. FC Doc# 2000672, filed Mar 5, 2020 8:37 AM, Linda Jarvis County Clerk, 6 pages, $42.00. **No conveyance** — amendment to memorandum of option only; no mineral impact. ISSUE-43 item 8. Phase 5

10. `2020-02-28_[337]_f` — Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) → Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. (warranty deed, surface+minerals, Freestone) — **WARRANTY DEED.** Conveys **1.354 acres** in Wm. Ritchie Survey A-527, Freestone County. Consideration: $10.00 + OGVC. ⚠️ **SCRIVENER'S ERROR**: Exhibit A legal description states "WILLIAM RITCHIE SURVEY, ABSTRACT NO. 527, **MADISON COUNTY**, TEXAS" — should be FREESTONE COUNTY; parent deed reference on same page correctly cites "OFFICIAL PUBLIC RECORDS, FREESTONE COUNTY, TEXAS" (see ISSUE-49). ⚠️ **County Clerk index**: cover page typed "WARNTY DEED" [sic] — deed text correctly reads "WARRANTY DEED." Parent deed: Vol. 1327, Pg. 561, O.P.R.F.C.T. = deed [16]/[37]. Same metes-and-bounds as [336] Schedule 3. **SUBJECT TO**: (1) All reservations of oil, gas and minerals, exceptions, covenants, conditions and restrictions in chain of title — **this preserves Gude's 50% non-executive mineral interest per deed [20]/[39]**; (2) any existing oil/gas leases or mineral leases; (3) any visible/apparent or recorded easements and roadways. **Trust No. 2 conveyed**: surface + 50% minerals + executive rights for the 1.354 ac. **Gude retains**: 50% non-executive mineral interest in the 1.354 ac (unchanged). Grantor address: McLennan County, Texas. Grantee: Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. (Dallas County); mailing address c/o Texas Central Partners, LLC, 1409 South Lamar Street, Suite 1022, Dallas TX 75215. Grantee VP: Jordan Riness (signed). Grantor acknowledged Feb 28, 2020, McLennan County, before Grace LaJan Coleman NP (ID#3222275, exp. 10/4/2022). Grantee acknowledged Mar 2, 2020, Dallas County, before Harriett Haran NP (ID#132278159, exp. 12/9/2023). Return to: Texas Central Partners, LLC, Attn.: Contract Land Staff, LLC, 1409 South Lamar Street, Suite 1022, Dallas TX 75215. Title company: Community National Title LLC, 14800 Quorum Dr Ste 150, Dallas TX 75254. FC Doc# 2000667, filed Mar 4, 2020 12:06 PM, Linda Jarvis County Clerk, 7 pages, $46.00. ⚠️ **Filing sequence**: [337] (warranty deed) filed Mar 4 (Doc# 2000667) BEFORE [336] (amendment) filed Mar 5 (Doc# 2000672) — both executed Feb 28, 2020. ⚠️ **Notary identity**: Grace LaJan Coleman (deeds [336]/[337], ID#3222275, exp. 10/4/2022) = LaJan Coleman (deed [335], ID#322227-5, exp. 10/4/2018) — same notary, renewed commission; same Beard/McLennan County relationship. **Confirms Beard sole trustee of Trust No. 2 as of February 2020.** ISSUE-43 item 8. Phase 5

04_MINERAL_RIGHTS_TRACKER.md.timestamp_summary: Deeds [335]–[337] — 1.354 ac Richie League conveyed to Texas Central Railroad; Trust No. 2 surface + 50% minerals + exec rights transferred; Gude 50% non-exec retained

operations.description: Add Texas Central Railroad conveyance note to Richie League mineral section
operations.content: - **Texas Central Railroad conveyance [deed [337], PULLED ✓]**: Warranty Deed, Trust No. 2 (M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee) → Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. (FC Doc# 2000667, filed 3/4/2020, executed 2/28/2020). Trust No. 2 conveyed **1.354 acres** of Wm. Ritchie A-527 to Texas Central for the Dallas–Houston high-speed rail project. Conveyance is SUBJECT TO existing mineral reservations in chain of title — **Gude's 50% non-executive mineral interest (per deed [20]/[39]) is preserved**. Trust No. 2 transferred its surface + 50% minerals + executive rights for the 1.354-ac parcel. Texas Central now holds: surface + 50% minerals + executive rights. Gude Management LLC retains: 50% non-executive minerals in the conveyed 1.354 ac. ⚠️ **SCRIVENER'S ERROR**: Deed [337] Exhibit A states "MADISON COUNTY" — should be FREESTONE COUNTY (ISSUE-49). Existing leases (if HBP) are preserved by "subject to" clause. Consideration: $10.00 + OGVC. Option history: [335] (11/7/2016, memorandum of option, 2.172 ac) → [336] (2/28/2020, amendment reducing to 1.354 ac) → [337] (2/28/2020, warranty deed conveying 1.354 ac). [PDF CONFIRMED: deeds [335]/[336]/[337], 2026-04-01]

05_OPEN_ISSUES.md.timestamp_summary: Deeds [335]–[337] — ISSUE-43 item 8 marked PULLED (Texas Central Railroad, 3 instruments); ISSUE-49 created (Madison County scrivener's error in deed [337])

operations.description: Add ISSUE-49 for Madison County scrivener's error in deed [337]
operations.anchor: - **Status**: OPEN — LOW PRIORITY; GEDCOM candidate identified but not confirmed; verification required before resolution
operations.content:
---

**ISSUE-49: Deed [337] Scrivener's Error — "Madison County" in Legal Description**
- **Status**: OPEN
- **Priority**: LOW (not a closing blocker; deed recorded in correct county; all other references correct)
- **County**: Freestone
- **Description**: Warranty deed [337] (FC Doc# 2000667, 2/28/2020) — Trust No. 2 → Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. — Exhibit A legal description states "WILLIAM RITCHIE SURVEY, ABSTRACT NO. 527, **MADISON COUNTY**, TEXAS." The correct county is FREESTONE COUNTY. The parent deed reference on the same page correctly states "OFFICIAL PUBLIC RECORDS, FREESTONE COUNTY, TEXAS (O.P.R.F.C.T.)." The deed was recorded in Freestone County. All other references in the instrument (cover page, granting clause, acknowledgments) reference Freestone County correctly.
- **Risk**: LOW. The deed was properly recorded in Freestone County and the metes-and-bounds (identical to [336] Schedule 3, which correctly states "FREESTONE COUNTY") unambiguously locates the parcel. A Texas court would almost certainly construe "Madison County" as a scrivener's error given the overwhelming Freestone County references throughout the instrument and the recording in Freestone County. However, a scrivener's affidavit or correction deed from either party would formally cure the defect.
- **Evidence**: Deed [337] Exhibit A page 6 of 7 (FC Doc# 2000667, image 154533388_90679866-06.png).
- **Action**: If Texas Central Railroad & Infrastructure, Inc. is still an active entity, a correction deed or scrivener's affidavit should be obtained. If the company has dissolved or the project has been abandoned, the landowner's attorney should prepare a scrivener's affidavit for recording in Freestone County. This is not urgent but should be addressed at the next attorney closing.
- **Added**: 2026-04-01 (deed [337] analysis)

[336] First Amendment to Memorandum of Option (2/28/2020, FC Doc# 2000672) — reduces option acreage to 1.354 ac via revised metes-and-bounds (Schedule 3); no conveyance. [337] Warranty Deed (2/28/2020, FC Doc# 2000667) — Trust No. 2 conveys 1.354 ac Wm. Ritchie A-527 to Texas Central for $10.00 + OGVC; subject to existing mineral reservations (Gude 50% non-exec preserved), leases, easements; ⚠️ SCRIVENER'S ERROR: Exhibit A says "Madison County" — should be Freestone County (ISSUE-49). M. Stephen Beard, Sole Trustee, signed all three. Dallas–Houston high-speed rail project. Title company: Community National Title LLC (Dallas)
